---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new cache location or feature
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What would you like added?**

**If proposing a new delete target**
- Exact path (use env vars, e.g. `%LOCALAPPDATA%\App\Cache`):
- Why is it safe to delete (does the app regenerate it)?
- Does it ever hold user data that would be lost?

**Additional context**
